message: Querying RAGFlow agent for: Port mismatch between wrapper and compute_ss: wrapper references trst_n port that doesn't exist in compute_ss module. How to resolve RTL port mismatch in nc_chipgen generated files?

function.arguments: {"query": "Port mismatch between wrapper and compute_ss: wrapper references trst_n port that doesn't exist in compute_ss module. How to resolve RTL port mismatch in nc_chipgen generated files?"}
function.name: query_ragflow

function.arguments:
{"command": "
MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== Wrapper.v: how does it instantiate compute_ss? ==="
grep -n "u_core\|compute_ss\|trst_n\|tck\|tdi\|tdo\|tms" \
  "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v" | head -60

echo ""
echo "=== compute_ss.v: module header / port list ==="
# Get module declaration and ports
awk '/^module mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss/,/^\);/' \
  "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v" | head -80

echo ""
echo "=== compute_ss: any debug/trst/jtag ports? ==="
grep -in "trst\|jtag\|tck\|tdi\|tdo\|tms\|swdio\|swdclk\|swd" \
  "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v" | head -20
"}
function.name: execute_bash

args.query: Port mismatch between wrapper and compute_ss: wrapper references trst_n port that doesn't exist in compute_ss module. How to resolve RTL port mismatch in nc_chipgen generated files?
